bio.Recent_Position: Social Media Marketing at Plantifique Skincare, Remote
bio.Bios: Hi!! My name is Meghan Cadigal and I initiated in my fall quarter of my third year here at UCI. In my free time I enjoy being active whether that be strength training, hiking, or swimming and also listening to my music on full blast. A fun fact about myself is that my dad spelt my middle name wrong on my birth certificate and now it iz what it iz. Ask me about skincare, my pbros, and concerts at recruitment!
